column3: "Milk Thistle reduces cholesterol" refers to its ability to lessen harmful low-density lipoprotein (LDL) cholesterol levels in a person's body while not significantly affecting the beneficial high-density lipoprotein (HDL) cholesterol.
"Milk Thistle lowers blood sugar levels" refers to its effect of improving insulin sensitivity, which helps regulate blood sugar.
"Milk Thistle boosts immune system" refers to its ability to enhance one's body defense against diseases and harmful organisms.
"Milk Thistle promotes healthy digestion" refers to its beneficial use that can help improve our body's ability to process food and absorb nutrients.
"Milk Thistle improves liver function" refers to its ability to enhance and heal liver cells, making it a beneficial herb for those with liver issues.
"Milk Thistle regulates skin conditions" refers to its ability to soothe or alleviate common skin problems by interacting positively with our body's natural processes.

"Milk Thistle enhances heart health" refers to its ability to help reduce heart damage and improve overall cardiovascular system functions,
        which may lead to better heart health.
"Milk Thistle stops metabolic diseases" refers to its ability to aid in preventing or lessening the effects of illnesses associated with body processes.
"Milk Thistle lowers blood pressure" refers to its ability to reduce high blood pressure levels naturally through plant extracts and nutrition.
"Milk Thistle boosts cognitive abilities" refers to its effect on enhancing mental processes and increasing brain function.
